name: Szechuan (Sichuan) Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Flank steak, halved into 5 cm cubes
1/4 cup Lard or frying oil, softened
1/3 cup Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 5 cm (2 inch) cubes and place in a deep pot with the spring onions, ginger, star anise, and orange peels. Cover with water.
2. Bring to a boil, skim off any impurities, then simmer for 2 hours covered over low heat.
3. Heat the lard and fry the seasoning ingredients for 1 minute. Pour into the pot and cover again.
4. Simmer for another hour or until the meat is very tender.
5. Transfer the meat to a serving dish. Thicken the sauce with a paste of corn flour and cold water.
6. Pour over the meat after discarding the onion, ginger, star anise, and orange peels.
